mean_en: a large official meeting, usually lasting for a few days, at which people with the same work or interests come together to discuss their views; a meeting at which people have formal discussions
sentence: A world Internet conference is being held in the hall.
sentence_trans: 大厅里正在举行一场世界互联网会议。
word_etyma: con共同 + fer承担 + ence名词后缀 → 共同商议承担 → conference会议
